seoTitle: Townson vs Townsville City — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Townson and Townsville City. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Townson vs Townsville City: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Townson and Townsville City.
heading: Townson vs Townsville City — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Townson, Queensland and Townsville City, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Townsville City has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Townson (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Townson or Townsville City safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Townson has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Townsville City scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Townson scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Townsville City scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Townson or Townsville City?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Townsville City has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
